name: What's the difference between work injury and occupational illness claim in Murray?
description: Illnesses gradual/exposure vs. sudden injuries; both compensable with proof.[1]

mainEntity.name: What's the difference between work injury and occupational illness claim in Murray?

acceptedAnswer.text: Illnesses gradual/exposure vs. sudden injuries; both compensable with proof.[1]
acceptedAnswer.description: Injuries are sudden events; illnesses gradual like repetitive or exposure diseases, both covered under AOE/COE in Utah.[1] Illnesses need stronger causation.[1] Key factors: No single incident for illness; latency ok; same benefits.[1] File same way but emphasize medical nexus for illnesses. Know distinction avoids denials.
